Notice Of Hearing On Motion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Feb-09-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Rachel S. Milman of the law offices of Rachel S. Milman (818-528-7700) appears as counsel for plaintiff/opposing party

Attorneys, Gregory S. Gilchrist and Sophy T. Manes of the law offices of Kilpatrick Townsend (415-273-7564) appear as co-counsels for defendant/moving party

Attorney, David Cardiff, in-house counsel, Levi Strauss & Co. (415-501-6968) appears as co-counsel for defendant/moving party

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT LEVI STRAUSS & COMPANY'S Motion To Compel Arbitration, to stay action pending arbitrator's jurisdictional ruling is GRANTED. The court is staying the action under Code Civ. Proc., 1281.4 because the federal district court has ordered arbitration of the dispute between plaintiff Division SIX Sports, Inc and Levi Strauss Asia Pacific Division Pte, Ltd, pursuant to their arbitration clause in the Master Service Agreement and arbitration claims have been filed by Levi Strauss & Co and Levi Strauss Asia Pacific Division Pte , Ltd against plaintiff pertaining to the MSA. The interpretation of the integration clause of the MSA and its scope is an issue of law that is involved in the present controversy affecting obligations of Levi Strauss & Co under the alleged oral contract of October 2011. Staying the current action is also consistent with well-recognized policies of preserving the jurisdiction of the arbitrator and conserving judicial resources. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Robert Balian, CSR No. 5220, e-mail: robertbalian.csr@gmail.com (L&M302)

Notice Of Hearing On Motion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Feb-06-2018 Continued To Feb-09-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT LEVI STRAUSS & COMPANY's Motion To Compel Arbitration is Continued to February 9, 2018 at 9:30 am to be heard by Judge Ulmer on the Law & Motion calendar. Judge Kahn recuses himself from this case.

Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D302/JPT/HK)
